Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}For some reason, Tomochika[n]is in front of the restaurant...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}You, uh, look good in that uniform. Forgot you chose this place too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Well, y'know... Just psyching myself up to prepare for the internship...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}I mean, being on time is like... the bare minimum job requirement, right...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 6 -1 -1 0 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}Guess my prospects are lookin' pretty grim... I overslept like hell.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Uh, yeah. So I guess we both picked the same place for the internship program...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 6 -1 -1 0 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}You're already a step ahead of me, though... I overslept like hell.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 10 25 25}Nooo... Dammit! I've really screwed this one up![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 10 25 25}Coming in late on my first day? They're gonna be so pissed![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}I know a guy who works here... He said the manager's a real hard-ass.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 10 25 25}Man, I really don't want to go in now... What do I do...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}Well, yeah, but... C'mon, you gotta help me! Any ideas at all!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}No, wait. Even if you back me up, I can't just tell them I overslept...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}I could just pretend I was here all along! Put on a uniform and stroll in like nothing happened...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}I'll just say my stomach wasn't feeling so good and I was in the bathroom this whole time![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}Please! Do me a solid. Grab me one of those uniforms and bring it out here![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}I'll treat you to any food you want! You can look at my homework! So please![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 2 25 25}Just hop on in there and grab it real quick! If you hide it under your shirt, nobody will—[cr][n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}...Seriously, why do I get stuck having to supervise two classes' worth of students?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}I'm suddenly the young and spry teacher when it's convenient... Sorry, I shouldn't be complaining to students.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}In any case, it looks like you two are doing just—[cr][n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}Why are you still dressed like that? Wait a minute, don't tell me...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}Are you kidding me!? How many times did I tell you all to be here not a minute late?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}Geez... First someone skipping out, and now this... Why does it always have to be my class?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 4 25 25}What!? Somebody skipped out? Well, that's just terrible! Talk about a failure of a human being![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}Don't you grin at me like you've found a friend![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}More importantly, I sure hope you called to let them know you were going to be late.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 6 -1 -1 0 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}Uh, well... you see... I guess my schedule just didn't line up, so...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}Always call first when you're running late! It's common sense! Ugh, I'm definitely getting a talking-to later...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 43 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}You're going to go apologize. Right now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 4 -1 -1 0 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 44 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 4 25 25}Wait, now!? I, uh... I need to gather my thoughts first and, uh...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}And what exactly do you mean by that? You're not trying to find some way of getting out of this, are you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 47 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}Are you even aware of all the trouble you could have caused?[n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 48 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}You left the team short-staffed! The manager's probably worried... If this were a real job, you'd be fired on the spot.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 49 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}Now go in there and apologize. Be ready to accept whatever punishment you get.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 55 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}If it makes you this upset, you shouldn't have been late in the first place.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 56 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}Remember: when you apologize, try to explain how you'll improve for next time. It reflects on you better.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 57 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}And no excuses. Make sure you really mean it. You got that?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 60 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}Guess I should go put in an apology from my side as well...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_037_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 62 0 0}Have you heard anything from Iori?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_039_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 63 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}I see... Ugh, the very least he could do is call out or something.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 64 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}Oh well. You should get back to work.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_040_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 65 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}Well, if you haven't heard anything, it's fine. But if he's playing hooky, there's going to be hell to pay.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 66 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}He has no idea how much trouble he's causing me... Tell him he'd better at least call out next time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_041_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 68 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}Put on a big smile and show them how much you love working service jobs![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_042_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I continued my work[n]through the afternoon...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Tomochika wasn't chewed out[n]too badly, but he worked the[n]rest of his shift in silence...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}When my first day of internship[n]concluded, I returned to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
